description: A field is renamed, removed, or retyped on a live event, crashing consumers and breaking replay of historical events.
body: Failure mode: a producer ships an incompatible payload change; deserializers in lagging consumers and in any replay of older events throw, and a rolling deploy means old and new shapes coexist on the topic. Detection signals: consumer deserialization errors spike after a producer deploy; replay of historical events fails to parse; no schema-registry compatibility check. Do not change fields in place on a live topic. Safer fallback: add fields as optional with defaults, keep old fields until consumers migrate, version the event for breaking changes, and gate with a CI compatibility check.
